Article.ArticleTitle: The effects of ectomycorrhizal fungi inoculation on alleviating Cd stress in Pinus massoniana seedlings.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Key laboratory of Plant Resource Conservation and Germplasm Innovation in Mountainous Region (Ministry of Education), College of Life Sciences/Institute of Agro-bioengineering, Guizhou University, Guizhou Key Laboratory of Agricultural Microbiology, Huaxi District, Guiyang, Guizhou Province, 550025, China.
